title: Battle of Kessel (disambiguation)
content:
Throughout its history, the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kessel/Legends|Kessel]] experienced several battles, including the following:

'''[[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]'''
:*[[Kessel encounter]]
:*[[Battle of Kessel (Wat Tambor)]]

'''[[Great Jedi Purge/Legends|Great Jedi Purge]]'''
:*[[Conclave on Kessel]]

'''[[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]'''
:*[[Ground Battle on Kessel]]
:*[[Space Battle in the Kessel Asteroid Field]]
:*[[Battle of Kessel (0 ABY)|Second Battle of Kessel]]
:*[[Rescue on Kessel]]
:*[[Liberation of Kessel]]
:*[[Skirmish near Kessel]]
:*[[Skirmish in the Maw]]
:*A [[Battle of Kessel (11 ABY)|battle]] in [[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]]

'''[[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] Insurgency'''
:*[[Battle of Kessel (Black Sun Insurgency)|Battle of Kessel]]

'''[[Yuuzhan Vong War]]'''
:*[[Battle of the Kessel system]]
